courseDetails.title: Visualization Techniques for Decision Makers and Leaders
courseDetails.shortDescription: How to see the end outcome while getting the work done
courseDetails.longDescription:
Visualization techniques for Decision Makers and Leaders: How to see the end outcome while getting the work done.


Visualization is a skill all effective leaders and decision makers should possess, deploy and continuously develop.

It helps to project solutions and possible outcomes for those in leadership and decision making positions.

Whether you are a supervisor, manager, team leader, director, c-suite executive, business owner, solopreneur, freelancer or any one responsible for outcomes or others, being able to see, visualize the potential opportunities, issues, steps and more along the way.

Visualization is a tool that helps reveal the various aspects related to tasks, processes, delivery of work, managing people, running a business successfully, running a business unit and many more uses.

Visualization can be used in various situations:

- Stress management and reduction

- Setting goals, targets and objectives

- Problem-Solving, Scenario Testing and Projections

- Finetuning impending and existing processes, tasks


Some Visualization techniques that leaders and decision makers can use include:

- Guided imagery

- Mental rehearsal

- Vision boards

- Positive affirmations and Self Talk

- Role play

- Coaching, Mentorship, Group Coaching, Brainstorming etc


Decision makers and leaders sometimes face some common challenges and we look at how to overcome them.

Some of those include: lack of motivation, distractions, fatigue, stress, over dependence on technology, overwhelm, confusion, lack of clarity, previous experiences etc.


This course looks at ways you can overcome the above challenges and develop the skill to Visualize as they make decisions.


Thank you for considering enrolling on this course and look forward to hearing your feedback.


Best regards,

Baba
targetAudiences: Anyone in a Decision Making role

courseDetails.title: Introduction to Risk Management in Financial Services
courseDetails.shortDescription: Your Introduction to ALL things Risk Management in Financial Services
courseDetails.longDescription:
Welcome to Introduction to Risk Management in Financial Services

In this course we look at:

Various approaches to risk and how financial services institutions perceive and manage risks.

Firstly we discuss the General Approach to Managing Risks.

We subsequently look at Common Risks in the industry, including:

- Credit Risk

- Market Risk

- Liquidity Risk

- Operational Risk

- Regulatory and Compliance Risk

- Reputational Risk

- Systemic Risk

- Counterparty Risk

- Technology Risk

We explore each of these at a high level, describing what it is, causes, ways to mitigate and examples of these risks (in a way that is easy to appreciate).


We move on to explore Key Components of Risk Management in Financial Services, including:

- Financial Services Risk Management Mitigation - General Approach

- Risk Identification

- Risk Assessment

- Risk Measurement and Monitoring

- Risk Mitigation

- Regulatory Compliance

- Risk Culture and Governance


All at a high level and an easy to appreciate perspective. This is an introductory course to facilitate the understanding of risk in Financial Services.


Lastly, we look at Effective Governance structures are essential in mitigating risks in financial services.

- Regulatory Compliance

- Risk Management

- Internal Controls

- Board Oversight

- Transparency and Disclosure

- Management Culture


I can't recommend this course enough to anyone working in or thinking of working in the Financial Services sector. It provides a gentle introduction to the risk perspective that educates and enlightens.


Thank you for stopping on this course and I look forward to getting some feedback from you.

Baba
targetAudiences: Tax professionals or aspiring tax professionals

courseDetails.title: No-Code Startup: Build a SaaS with CodeCanyon PHP Scripts
courseDetails.shortDescription: Learn how to launch a SaaS-style startup using CodeCanyon PHP scripts, hosting, branding, SEO, and AI tools.
courseDetails.longDescription:
This course contains the use of artificial intelligence.

In this course, you will learn how to launch a simple SaaS-style startup without writing code from scratch.

Instead of building everything manually, we will use ready-made PHP scripts from CodeCanyon and turn them into a real online project. The goal is to show you a practical, beginner-friendly process for taking an existing script, setting it up, customizing it, and preparing it as a startup idea.

You will learn how to think about startup ideas, choose a niche, evaluate scripts, buy and install a PHP script, connect it to hosting, configure basic settings, customize the platform, and use AI tools to improve your workflow. We will also cover important steps such as branding, domain selection, basic SEO, landing page structure, and preparing the project for users.

This course is not about becoming a professional developer. It is about understanding how to use existing tools, scripts, and AI to move faster and launch something real.

By the end of the course, you will have a clearer understanding of how no-code and low-code startup building works, how CodeCanyon PHP scripts can be used as a foundation, and how to take a simple idea from concept to launch.

This course is ideal for beginners, entrepreneurs, freelancers, marketers, and anyone who wants to build online projects without starting from zero.
targetAudiences: Beginners who want to build startup ideas without coding everything from scratch.
Entrepreneurs who want to launch low-budget digital products using ready-made tools.
Freelancers, creators, and marketers interested in SaaS, AI tools, and online businesses.
Students who want to understand how CodeCanyon scripts can become real startup projects.
Anyone interested in using AI and existing software to move faster from idea to launch.

courseDetails.title: Sustainable Business Fundamentals
courseDetails.shortDescription: Why Sustainable Businesses Win (And Others Fail) in the 21st Century
courseDetails.longDescription:
What if sustainability wasn’t a cost… but your biggest competitive advantage?

The world is changing fast. Climate change, resource scarcity, and shifting consumer expectations are transforming how businesses operate. Today, companies that ignore sustainability risk are falling behind—while those that embrace it are winning customers, reducing risks, and driving long-term growth. This course gives you the tools to turn sustainability into a powerful business strategy.


What This Course Will Teach You

In this practical and engaging course, you’ll learn how to integrate sustainability into real business decisions.

You’ll discover how to:

  • Build a sustainable business strategy that drives growth

  • Leverage the circular economy to reduce waste and increase efficiency

  • Create value while respecting environmental and social limits

  • Turn sustainability into a competitive advantage

  • Anticipate future trends shaping the business landscape of tomorrow


Why This Course Matters

Sustainability is no longer optional—it’s a core driver of innovation, resilience, and profitability. Leading companies are already using sustainable practices to:

  • Strengthen their brand and customer trust

  • Reduce operational risks and costs

  • Unlock new market opportunities

Who This Course Is For

This course is designed for:

  • Business professionals and managers

  • Entrepreneurs and startup founders

  • Students interested in business and sustainability

  • Anyone who wants to understand the future of business

No prior knowledge is required—just curiosity and a willingness to learn.


What Makes This Course Different

  • Clear and simple explanations of complex concepts

  • Real-world examples and practical insights

  • Focus on actionable strategies, not just theory

  • Designed for both beginners and professionals

Real-World Impact

From global corporations to small startups, sustainable business practices are shaping the future. This course empowers you to make smarter decisions, create positive impact, and stay competitive in a rapidly evolving world.


By the End of This Course, You Will Be Able To:

  • Understand the fundamentals of sustainable business

  • Apply sustainability principles in real-world situations

  • Identify opportunities for innovation and growth

  • Build strategies that balance profit, people, and planet
targetAudiences: Business Professionals, Sustainabaility Professionals, Curious Learners.

courseDetails.title: Urban Waste Management
courseDetails.shortDescription: A Concise Introduction to What You Need to Know about Urban Waste Management
courseDetails.longDescription:
Waste management is one of the most critical challenges facing modern cities and industries. This course is designed to provide a structured, high-yield overview of solid waste management. By focusing strictly on core principles, technical frameworks, and real-world applications, it delivers a foundational understanding of the field, which is perfect for busy professionals, students, or anyone looking to understand the mechanics of sustainability.

What We Will Cover:

This course guides you through the entire lifecycle of waste management, structured into six clear modules:

  • 1. Introduction: An overview of the global waste challenge and the fundamental goals of modern management systems.

  • 2. Waste Characteristics: Understanding how waste is classified by its physical and chemical properties to determine how it should be treated.

  • 3. Waste Collection and Transportation: The logistics behind moving waste efficiently, including routing strategies and transfer stations.

  • 4. Waste Management Techniques: A look at processing methods, from recycling and composting to engineered sanitary landfills.

  • 5. Waste-to-Energy: Potential and Challenges: A balanced look at technologies like incineration and anaerobic digestion, weighing their energy benefits against environmental trade-offs.

  • 6. Conclusion: A summary of key takeaways and a look toward the future of the circular economy.

Who This Course Is For

  • Environmental & Engineering Students: Ideal as a quick, comprehensive primer or a structured review before exams.

  • Sustainability & Municipal Professionals: A great way to brush up on standard waste logistics and treatment frameworks.

  • Eco-Entrepreneurs: Helpful for understanding the operational realities of recycling, collection, and green technology.

  • Curious Learners: Anyone interested in a clear, scientific look at what actually happens to our waste after it leaves the bin.

Course Details

  • Duration: 1 Hour

  • Format: Straight-to-the-point video lectures covering theory, logistics, and technology.

  • Prerequisites: None. Complex concepts are broken down into accessible, easy-to-understand terms.

If you are looking for a straightforward, well-paced introduction to the world of waste management that respects your time, feel free to check out the preview videos and join the course.
targetAudiences: Professionals, Decision-makers, Consultants, Executives and anyone curious about the topic of Waste Management

courseDetails.title: Blender 3D Sculpt Temelleri, 3D Karakter Oranları ve Anatomi
courseDetails.shortDescription: Blender 3D karakter anatomi oranları, sculpt temellerini öğren | Learn Blender 3D anatomy proportions, brushes, torso
courseDetails.longDescription:
***This course is presented in Turkish but English subtitles are available.

Tr: 3D karakter modelleme dünyasına sağlam bir adım atmaya hazır mısınız? Bu ücretsiz kurs, Blender 3D'de karakter oluşturmanın en temellerini ezberden uzak, mantığıyla birlikte kavramanız için tasarlandı.

Bu Kursta Neler Öğreneceksiniz?

•Erkek ve kadın yüz, kafa ve vücut oranlarının temel mantığı ve modelleme esnasında oran doğruluğunu test etme yöntemleri,

•Blender 3D'de kullanılan temel fırçalar ve doğru fırça teknikleri,

•Kadın üst vücut üzerinden adım adım sculpt uygulaması ve çalışma önerileri,

•Farklı kumaş kırışıklık türlerinin teorik tanıtımı ve sculpt modunda temel kıyafet/kırışıklık oluşturma süreçleri.


Bu kurs tamamen yeni başlayan kişiler için uygundur. Herhangi bir deneyim gerektirmez.


Eng: Are you ready to take a solid first step into the world of 3D character modeling? This free course is designed to help you understand the fundamentals of character creation in Blender 3D—not just by rote, but by grasping the underlying logic.

What Will You Learn in This Course?

•The fundamental logic behind male and female facial, head, and body proportions, and methods for verifying proportion accuracy during modeling,

•Basic brushes used in Blender 3D and proper brush techniques,

•Step-by-step sculpting application on a female upper body and practical tips,

•A theoretical introduction to different types of fabric wrinkles and the basic processes for creating clothing and wrinkles in sculpt mode.


This course is suitable for complete beginners. No prior experience is required.
targetAudiences: İnsan kafa ve yüz oranlarını öğrenmek isteyenler
